name: Nadia Rahman
testimonialTitle: Our sales doubled in just 2 months!
complement: Before Driplare, I was manually replying to hundreds of Facebook messages every day. Now the AI handles everything—collects orders, answers questions, even remembers customer preferences. I finally have time to focus on growing my business instead of just managing messages.
testimonial: Before Driplare, I was manually replying to hundreds of Facebook messages every day. Now the AI handles everything—collects orders, answers questions, even remembers customer preferences. I finally have time to focus on growing my business instead of just managing messages.

name: Mehedi Hassan
testimonialTitle: Best investment I made for my business
complement: We were spending 15,000 taka per month on someone to manage customer messages. With Driplare's one-time fee, we got a better system that works 24/7 and never makes mistakes. The ROI was obvious within the first month. Highly recommend!
testimonial: We were spending 15,000 taka per month on someone to manage customer messages. With Driplare's one-time fee, we got a better system that works 24/7 and never makes mistakes. The ROI was obvious within the first month. Highly recommend!

name: Kamal Uddin
testimonialTitle: From chaos to organized in 48 hours
complement: Before, customer orders were scattered across WhatsApp, Messenger, and phone calls. I was losing track and making mistakes. Now everything is in one Google Sheet—name, phone, address, items, everything! My delivery process is 10x smoother.
testimonial: Before, customer orders were scattered across WhatsApp, Messenger, and phone calls. I was losing track and making mistakes. Now everything is in one Google Sheet—name, phone, address, items, everything! My delivery process is 10x smoother.

name: Sabrina Khan
complement: Our customer satisfaction went through the roof! People love getting instant answers about product sizes, colors, and delivery. The AI even remembers returning customers and greets them by name. It feels so personal, nobody realizes it's automated.
testimonial: Our customer satisfaction went through the roof! People love getting instant answers about product sizes, colors, and delivery. The AI even remembers returning customers and greets them by name. It feels so personal, nobody realizes it's automated.

name: Rafiq Ahmed
testimonialTitle: No more missed orders while sleeping!
complement: I used to lose so many late-night orders because I couldn't reply fast enough. Now customers get instant responses 24/7, and every order is automatically saved in my Google Sheet. It's like having a full-time employee who never sleeps!
